title: Iswara temple in Jalasangvi
tagline: Iswara temple in Jalasangvi — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Iswara temple also known by other names Kamalishwara temple, Kamaleshwara temple, Kalleshwara temple, Eshwara temple is located in Jalasangvi village, about 10 km north-west of Hum
overview.description: Iswara temple also known by other names Kamalishwara temple, Kamaleshwara temple, Kalleshwara temple, Eshwara temple is located in Jalasangvi village, about 10 km north-west of Humnabad Taluk of Bidar district, Karnataka, India. According to the inscriptions found the temple was built during the reign of the celebrated emperor Vikramaditya VI of Kalyana Chalukya dynasty.

topPlaces.name: Jalasangvi
topPlaces.description: Jalasangvi (or Jalasangavi or Jalsangi) is a village in Homnabad Taluk, Bidar district, Karnataka, India. It is located close to Dubalgundi, on the Gulbarga - Bidar state highway, at the northern end of Karnataka State.

topPlaces.name: Dubalgundi
topPlaces.description: Dubalgundi is a large village( Hobli) in Humnabad taluka of Bidar district in the Indian state of Karnataka.It is 15km from Humnabad and 40km from Bidar district.

topPlaces.name: Kodambal
topPlaces.description: Kodambal is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Chitguppa taluk of Bidar district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.description: Nirna is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Homnabad taluk of Bidar district.

topPlaces.name: Humnabad
topPlaces.description: Humnabad, also known as Jayasimha Nagar, is a city and municipal council in the Bidar District of the Indian state of Karnataka. Humnabad is the headquarters of Humnabad taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Iswara temple in Jalasangvi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Iswara temple in Jalasangvi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Iswara temple in Jalasangvi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (148 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (135 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Iswara temple in Jalasangvi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Iswara temple in Jalasangvi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Iswara temple in Jalasangvi?
faq.a: Stays in Iswara temple in Jalasangvi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Iswara temple in Jalasangvi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jalasangvi, Dubalgundi, Kodambal, Nirna, Ghatboral.
